mapper.select: SELECT /** AppFormMapper.getScnViewerInfo */ SCAN_ID , REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{resNo}
SELECT /** AppFormMapper.getScnViewerInfoTypeS */ SCAN_ID , REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{resNo}
SELECT /** AppFormMapper.getScanViewerVersion */ DOC_NM FROM EMV_SCAN_DOC@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_ID = 'E9999'
SELECT /** AppFormMapper.getScnViewerRgstDtTypeS */ TO_CHAR(RGST_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD')AS RGST_DT FROM EMV_SCAN_MST WHERE SCAN_ID = #{SCAN_ID}
SELECT /** AppFormMapper.getScnViewerRgstDt */ TO_CHAR(RGST_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD')AS RGST_DT FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{SCAN_ID}
SELECT SCAN_ID AS scanId , FILE_ID AS fileId , DOC_ID AS docId , ORIGIN_DIR AS originDir FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.update:
SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUMBER), 0) + 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{originScanId}
INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP( FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , FILE_NUMBER , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , SAVE_DIR , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , BANK_CD , BANK_CD_NO , CONTRACT_NUM , ITEM_ID , ANN , CHANNEL ) SELECT FILE_ID , #{originScanId} , #{fileNumber} , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , SAVE_DIR , SYSDATE , #{userId} , BANK_CD , BANK_CD_NO , CONTRACT_NUM , ITEM_ID , ANN , CHANNEL FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND FILE_ID = #{fileId}
